user_query: I'm putting together my expense report. What are the most expensive restaurants I've booked?

selected_nodes.name: Kaiseki Kaji
selected_nodes.description: Exquisite Japanese kaiseki dining experience. Very expensive omakase with seasonal courses. Intimate and formal setting.
selected_nodes.reasoning: Kaiseki Kaji is explicitly described as 'Very expensive' with a high expected cost of CAD 250-350.

selected_nodes.name: Alo Restaurant
selected_nodes.description: Three Michelin-starred French tasting menu. Extremely expensive and exclusive fine dining. Intimate 8-course experience with wine pairings. Very formal and upscale.
selected_nodes.reasoning: Alo Restaurant is described as 'Extremely expensive' with the highest expected cost of CAD 300-400.

selected_nodes.name: Canoe Restaurant
selected_nodes.description: Upscale Canadian cuisine on the 54th floor of TD Tower. Expensive fine dining with panoramic city views. Elegant and formal atmosphere.
selected_nodes.reasoning: Canoe Restaurant is described as 'Expensive fine dining' with a high expected cost of CAD 150-200.
